subcodes.first_line: The tongue of truth at the opening of this missive speaketh these words: O companion of the soul, where art thou? In truth, there is no greater fire than [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان صدق در اول نامه باینکلمه ناطق ای مونس جان کجائی فی الحقیقه ناری اعظم از
subcodes.subjects: @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @love as fire, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Lesser Peace and the Most Great Peace, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @universal peace; world unity, @knowledge of self
